one_time_description: DFO Account funds received of $3,484,671 (Department of Fisheries and Oceans), appears to be a new/non-recurring funding deposit
economic_notes: Subsidiaries include Metepenagiag Heritage Park Inc., 651738 N.B. Ltd. (Riverside Entertainment Centre), Metepenagiag Economic Ventures Corporation, Metepenagiag Moncton Lands 1 Corporation, and Metepenagiag Moncton Lands 2 Corporation. Riverside land rent and Moncton 2 Rent suggest commercial land holdings near Moncton.
notes: Organization did not meet certain financial ratio covenants in loan agreements; lenders have not indicated further action. DFO Account received $3,484,671 in new funds this year (nil prior year). Net debt increased from $16.2M to $21.0M. Covenant breach on bank indebtedness facility noted. Remuneration schedule referenced pages 28-29 but not included in provided pages. Current liabilities calculated as bank indebtedness + operating lines of credit + accounts payable = 2511442+14000+2465511 = 4990953 excluding deferred revenue. Five subsidiaries fully consolidated. Funds on deposit appear as both liability and non-financial asset on balance sheet.
